item.title: Going Through The AI Storm
item.description: AI's volatility is forcing a choice between cosmetic adaptation and fundamental reinvention, and only those willing to step outside the consensus take will come through stronger.

item.title: Gulf War and AI Parallels 2
item.description: An analysis of structural parallels between Western military engagement in the Gulf and the current AI industry adoption cycle.

item.description: An analysis of structural parallels between Western military engagement in the Gulf and the current AI industry adoption cycle.

item.title: OpenAI Plus Cancelled
item.description: Reasons why I have decided to cancel my OpenAI Plust monthly subscription

item.title: Using Pydantic 101
item.description: Working with data almost always starts with data clearning, parsing, and validating. Pydantic is a Python library that sets standards for how it should be done.

item.title: Dot operator
item.description: Dot operator in Python is probably always overlooked, but it holds crucial mechanism for object-oriented programming.

item.title: Metaclasses
item.description: Metaclasses in Python are advanced concepts, but let's see if we can unpack the complexity.

item.title: Managing Python Versions and Virtual Environments
item.description: The best complementary tools for managing virtual environments in Python development process
